title: Blocking With Sword
description: No shield at hand - no problem! You can block half the damage with any sword!
body:
## 📖 About
With this datapack, any sword can be used as a shield, but will only block half the damage.

### Features:
- When a player takes a sword into his hand, the `blocks_attacks` and `use_cooldown` components are added to it.
  - The `use_cooldown` component is needed for the general delay group for all swords separately from shields;
- The sword blocks half of the damage;
- After disabling blocking with an axe, the player cannot use the sword as a shield or as a weapon at all;
- If the player has a shield in either hand, blocking with sword is disabled.

#

You can leave a comment on the PMC page!
